sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. stock (US58933Y1055): Is Keytruda's dominance strong enough for sustained growth?

feed.title: News Corp Updates US$1 Billion Nasdaq Share Buy-Back, Excludes ASX CDIs
feed.summary: News Corp has updated its 2025 share repurchase program, authorizing the buy-back of up to US$1 billion in Nasdaq-listed Class A and B common stock, specifically excluding ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests. The company's recent analyst rating is a "Buy" with a A$50.00 price target.
